## FormIR.typeRegistry property

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.

Registry of named types referenced by fields in this form. Keys are fully-qualified type names matching `ReferenceTypeNode.name`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly typeRegistry: Readonly<Record<string, TypeDefinition>>;
```
